---
title: "Louisa Fanny Field"
---

## Louisa Fanny Field

**Dates:** (1856-31 Dec 1941)

**Maiden name:** (Story)

### Description

children\'s writer

### Biography

She was author of <i>The Child and His Book</i>, and a contributor to <i>MP</i> (1895) (as Mrs E. M. Field) and (1898) (as Louise F. Field). From 1893 she edited the GFS journal <i>Friendly Work</i>. She also contributed to <i>Mothers in Council</i>, later joining the staff.

She married (1882) Edward Maclaine Field (b.1852), school inspector. She was opposed to women’s suffrage. Her obituary is in <i>The Times</i> (1 January 1942).  

]Louisa Fanny (Story) Field (1856-31 Dec 1941) wrote, as ‘Mrs E. M. Field’ fiction and histories of children’s books,

### Letters

- Letter from May 2d 1900
- Letter from Sept 20th 1897  

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
